name: immigration_policy_school_district_s_new_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A Immigration Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving immigration policy school district s new oakline rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Priya Silva
agents.identity: I am Priya Silva, accountable for a defensible call in Immigration Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Ansel Chen
agents.identity: I am Ansel Chen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Immigration Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Priya Silva must decide under rights vs utility. What does Priya Silva do?
